scripts.build:server: tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && shx chmod +x dist/server/cli.js && shx rm -rf dist/server/defaults && node scripts/copy-defaults.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:ui
scripts.dev:harness: npm run build:server && concurrently -n harness,ui -c yellow,green "node dist/server/harness.js -- --cwd . --no-ui" "vite"
scripts.dev:watchdog: npm run build:server && concurrently -n watchdog,ui -c red,green "node dist/server/watchdog.js -- --cwd . --no-ui" "vite"
scripts.test:bundle: npm run build:ui && npx tsx --test tests/bundle-size.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build --silent && npm run test:e2e:run --
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: npm run build --silent && npm run test:e2e:run -- --grep @smoke
scripts.test:manual: npm run build && npx playwright test --config playwright-manual.config.ts
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build:server && shx rm -rf coverage && NODE_V8_COVERAGE=coverage/tmp npm run test:e2e:run -- --project api && npx c8 --temp-directory=coverage/tmp --src=src/server npx tsx --test --test-force-exit tests/workflow-manager-logic.test.ts tests/task-state-machine.test.ts tests/name-validation.test.ts tests/gate-store-logic.test.ts tests/system-prompt.test.ts tests/session-store.test.ts tests/cost-tracker.test.ts tests/event-buffer.test.ts tests/staff-trigger-engine.test.ts && npx c8 report --temp-directory=coverage/tmp --reports-dir=coverage --reporter=html --reporter=lcov --reporter=text
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e:run --
